title: Tips to Soothe an Overtired Toddler Before Sleep
description: Establishing a calm bedtime can be challenging with an overtired toddler. Consider creating a soothing routine that includes dimming the lights, reading a gentle story, or playing a bedtime story in your own recorded voice to help them relax. Soft music or white noise can also promote sleepiness. Try these tips and embrace the joy of a peaceful bedtime routine. Explore the warmth of NinniTales and help your little one drift off to sleep with your voice. #ToddlerSleep #BedtimeRoutine #CalmYourToddler
